ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine batch */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the production batch */,
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vineyard where the wine was produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was produced */,
  "bottle_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was bottled */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the wine (e.g., White, Red) */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the wine (1-10) */,
  "bottle_count" INTEGER /* Number of bottles produced */,
  "wine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine batch */,
  "wine_description" TEXT /* Description of the wine batch */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the wine is released to the market */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine is produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_vineyard_id FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard_id") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "vineyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vineyard */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vineyard */,
  "vineyard_size" REAL /* Total area of the vineyard */,
  "vineyard_soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the vineyard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of chemical properties */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH value of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the chemical properties were analyzed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster who conducted the assessment */,
  "taste_score" REAL /* Taste score given by the taster (1-10) */,
  "aroma_score" REAL /* Aroma score given by the taster (1-10) */,
  "visual_score" REAL /* Visual score given by the taster (1-10) */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score given by the taster (1-10) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the taster */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  "assessment_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES tasters ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasters" (
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taster */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Full name of the taster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taster */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., white wines, red wines) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification held by the taster */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production detail */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "grape_type" TEXT /* Type of grapes used */,
  "harvest_year" TEXT /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "fermentation_type" TEXT /* Type of fermentation (e.g., traditional, carbonic maceration) */,
  "fermentation_time" INTEGER /* Time in days for fermentation */,
  "barrel_type" TEXT /* Type of barrel used for aging (e.g., oak, stainless steel) */,
  "aging_time" INTEGER /* Time in months for aging */,
  "winemaking_techniques" TEXT /* Winemaking techniques used */,
  "yeast_strain" TEXT /* Yeast strain used during fermentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_details_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bottling_details" (
  "bottle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bottling detail */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "bottle_size" REAL /* Size of the bottle in liters */,
  "bottle_material" TEXT /* Material of the bottle (e.g., glass, plastic) */,
  "cork_type" TEXT /* Type of cork used (e.g., natural, synthetic) */,
  "label_design" TEXT /* Design of the label */,
  "bottle_number" INTEGER /* Unique number for the bottle */,
  "capping_type" TEXT /* Type of capping used (e.g., screwcap, cork) */,
  "label_maker" TEXT /* Name of the label maker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bottle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bottling_details_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "control_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control check was performed */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of quality control check (e.g., chemical, sensory) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who conducted the check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the quality control check */,
  "control_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control */,
  "qc_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of bottles sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price per bottle in USD */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor who made the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "sale_promotion" TEXT /* Promotion applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the distributor */,
  "distributor_type" TEXT /* Type of distributor (e.g., local, national) */,
  "distributor_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control manager, production team, data analyst) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., wine batch, sales data) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the wine batch */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the wine batch */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., quality rating, sales data) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of historical data (e.g., quality ratings, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)
